Collection 01

Post-Symbolism

“Nature becomes a symbol when colour begins to speak.”

The Post-Symbolism paintings of contemporary artist Nona Dronova transform botanical forms into emotional and symbolic images. Flowers are not presented as botanical subjects but as metaphors for memory, beauty, time and inner experience. Through expressive colour, decorative rhythm and painterly freedom, nature becomes a universal visual language that connects emotion with contemporary artistic expression.
